response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of strong general software engineering experience with genuine staff-level seniority and a directly relevant recent role building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq. However, the role's core technical requirements — Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and production-grade LLM systems — are either absent from his skills list or only cursorily represented in his current 13-month engagement. His AI depth is not yet demonstrated at the scale or breadth the position demands, making him a risky but potentially high-upside bet if the MCP and agentic work at re:cinq is more substantial than the resume conveys.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflow infrastructure — a listed key technology for the role
Staff-level seniority with demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, mentoring (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses), and cross-stack delivery
Solid TypeScript/Node.js production background including high-throughput data integration (millions of req/s at Dunnhumby) and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK at Optilyz)
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the listed skills despite being the primary required language for AI/ML production work in this role
No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines — all core technical requirements
Meaningful AI/GenAI production experience appears limited to ~13 months at the current role, well short of the 8-year minimum specified

key_factors.factor: Missing Python / RAG / vector DB skills
MCP and agentic workflow hands-on experience
